gist.headline: EaglePollen takes flight
gist.blurb: A new community app just landed in the greenhouse! EaglePollen Video automates your TikTok video creation using the power of the hive.
gist.summary: Added EaglePollen Video, a new community application that automates TikTok video generation, to the project showcase.
gist.impact: Users can now discover and use EaglePollen Video to easily generate automated video content for TikTok.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee acting as a film director alongside a friendly eagle character, representing the EaglePollen Video app. They are creating mobile/TikTok videos together.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the bee wearing a tiny director's beret, filming a vertical video on a smartphone with a small, friendly pixel eagle. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel peach gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
